reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME DEVS PLEASE UPDATE IT
reviews.review_description: I love this game so much its so much fun and unique i just really hope the creators update atleaat one more time because its truly an amazing expierence with the main story and all the stuff to discover and do in the multiplayer area please Devs update this masterpiece one more time I'm begging you one update is all it needs to become popular again so i beg please update even if its only one more time

reviews.review_title: Absolutely amazing, but it sucks now.
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing, tons of lore that I am still attempting to learn, the magic system is amazing, there are so many different things to do, jam out with friends and throw stuff at the mc, explore in the sand dunes, with plenty of things to explore, but I have something to say, there needs to be a way to speak and communicate , and it’s abandoned and there is never anything new.

The Under Presents is one of the most rewarding experiments in VR entertainment I've experienced. Its 'scrunching' movement system (pulling the landscape toward you elastically) feels so natural that other developers should steal it shamelessly. 

The game centers on a mysterious story aboard a doomed ship where you're a ghost witnessing theatrical performances, then learning to manipulate time and influence character fates through surreal puzzle-solving. 

The graphics are stylized and exceptionally well directed, sometimes beautiful, occasionally haunting. Everything feels tactile with great haptics. This isn't about beating the game, it's about exploring surreal locations and discovering weirdness. 

It will only disappoint gamers who demand games conform to their expectations. For everyone else, it's thoughtful, joyful, and deeply engaging. For the full review, search YouTube for 6DOF Reviews The Under Presents.

reviews.review_title: Why did you abandon the demo idea?
reviews.review_description: I'm gonna be honest, i haven't played the game in awhile so they may have readded it, but the idea in the demo where you used your past self to help you complete puzzles was so good, then i bought the full game and there was none of that. It was just using your mask to time travel. If they add in the idea that the demo introduced i may increase my rating but until then, sorry guys
This is one of the best games I have ever played It cures ma boredom I just wish it updated

every time i play this game i always see servers just zero i just decided to abandon this game cuz we so hard to find someone right now or it was actually because how much impossible it was to find one player

reviews.review_title: For those that ask why is it dead
reviews.review_description: So the people that play and no one is on its because they could not be able to do the live acting so the best event they did came to a close and then they made it a long time ago so that's why there's no mics and if they do decided to update and act again we could see more players more events and mics could be added but that's why its dead
The demo part is a lot of fun, and I especially like how the starting part was free so you could get a chance to play, yet the creators still get money for the second part! Smart idea.
I had so much memories, it feels like just yesterday I had just met MC, also it would be cool if you can make custom masks with their own abilities. :]
Seriously, the actual 'game' has no content, if you like stories then sure, get this but I'll warn you that there's nothing besides a story, a story you're not even a part of

This game is AMAZING, i love both the multiplayer and Timeboat with each character's puzzle (Sandy's one is annoying tho). There are so many secrets both in the mask combinations and map that, even years that ive been playing this, i think i didnt even find 30% of all the stuff there is. One bad thing tho is the fact that the game didnt receive un update in a LONG while (didnt see one since ive started playing) and the game is pretty dead apart from a few players sometimes. Normally it wouldnt be much of an issue for me but a lot of structures and secrets in the map require more than one player (3 or even 4) and it kinda sucks not being able to access that content because there arent players most of the time. Would be cool if (somehow) there was a way to get those puzzles to work in singleplayer (maybe for structures, in single player mode, you can rebuild it without other players but for puzzle i have no idea how to make those singleplayer) but the game is still cool and is great seeing other people still play this game. Also another minor thing because i don't know if this is a feature or not but is there a way to change mask/hat once you unlock some? So, to recap cuz this is getting too long: this game is great and worth it, but it being dead and therefore not being people most of the time locks away some of the content of the main map, but there is also timeboat which is very cool so yeah definetely worth it.

reviews.review_title: Why do you have to pay
reviews.review_description: Why do you have to pay

Don’t get me wrong this is a good game but if you came from the demo you’re in for a shock. For example the mechanic of your past self showing up never happens again. The story mode is much less deep than you would hope from the demo and the only thing you do is walk around and listen to people talk. The only thing you can do to progress is wind back time and run around snapping your fingers. The demo was an amazing preview to an entirely different game. I feel like the game was going to be completely different but they scrapped it and rushed it. If you enjoyed the demo for the trippyness and time mechanic find a different game. If not their is still fun to it but I feel cheated out of my money.

reviews.review_description: I bought this game 2 years ago and never reviewed it. It’s an amazing multiplayer experience that allows you to do things you will never see in other games. Some people might complain about having no voice chat but that’s what keeps its friendly and gives it that mysterious feeling. the time boat is the most unique concept I’ve ever seen in a game and its amazing how you need to save characters and prevent there deaths(Gerald🐬). it’s almost like you know other players after only 2 minutes of interacting with them. The movement is so addictive it’s kind of like looking at the present and the future. I’m sure anyone who views this review can agree.

I just realized I never got around to reviewing this game. It was an unforgettable experience, unlike anything I’d played before, and I’ve yet to encounter anything like it since. If you appreciate games that are weird and wonderful, I highly recommend giving this one a try. It is worth at least trying out.

I've played the full game and it was pretty meh, I was disappointed to see that the mechanic of your past self helping your future self disappeared and it just turned into a story game where you could change time

developer_response.body:

developer_response.body: Hi Leenie_Grl! All acts of Timeboat are available to play, you just need to unlock each act by watching the previous act to the end. The easiest way to do this is to use your mask to fast-forward to the end. After watching Act 2 to it's end, you should see Act 3 become playable in the photobooth.

developer_response.body: Hello BadHombre69! Live actor encounters in the Under were spontaneous events that took place within the multiplayer area, in which our team of actors would appear in game and interact with players. And while live actor encounters ended in 2020, the multiplayer space is still active with players and has much to offer.

reviews.review_title: How to even explain this game...
reviews.review_description:
This game blew my tiny little mind. I love the different layers. The Aickman part took quite awhile for my to understand what the heck was going on but once I understood, I was loving it. I also finally found quite a few fellow timesprites who were gracious enough to walk me thru some of the more complicated spells, and took me to the different parts of the Under. 
Hope to see live actors and new shows soon.

*Updated: After playing for a month or two,
I have some suggestions.
One, after all areas are accessed on the map, and the Aickman is finished, there’s really nothing to do but wander around and cast spells. How about some kind of regular update with a quest, or mini game?

Also, for those of us who work odd hours and get stuck playing when no one else is on, it makes it impossible to reach the Observatory, Crob Pit, and Workshop. It’s frustrating when all I want to do is work on my mask spells in the workshop. Maybe add some alternate access points? Or new access points specifically for solo players with some new mask options? Or maybe a dev, or live-actor can be available at specific time frames for the solo players and act as a spell buddy, or even teach spells. 

Since I can’t access the workshop on my own, it would be awesome to take items with me so I can practice up on the ship hull (where I like to hang out and watch the stage from the pillow area). Can we have a way to hold inventory?

How about some new acts to watch on the stage? If I get Wet Food stuck in my head one more time, I’m going to put my head in the oven. Or regular intervals of Tempest? 



I don’t want this game to go anywhere. It’s too unique and amazing. So please don’t let it go stale. Please consider investing time into giving us fresh content.

It’s need onion support so I don’t have to switch between a million servers to find my friend and also a voice chat. Oh and maybe just maybe a spell menu or a spell book because if I want a hat o don’t want to spend 55 minuets trying to get a salt shaker to get a bow hat and my hats aren’t staying. They disappear after I leave the game. Please add at least one of these things “preferably the hat one or the online one”

(Responding to the dev: no where on the store does it say this is a demo. Label it as such. There is nothing free, besides the little intro, to this game. It's a demo. Label it.) Dont bother unless you want to spend money every time you jump in. Really bad attempt at a paywall game.

developer_response.body: We know that this is a unique model for games! The Under Presents is a larger game world with a free intro and multiple hours of content, this demo is explicitly explained on our store page. Buying a ticket to the Tempest, our live show, will give you permanent access to the multiplayer hub world and potential further actor encounters. Tempest itself is a completely optional DLC option within The Under app. Think of “Tempest” like buying a ticket to a live show, theater event or movie, except you are able to actively participate and shape the experience. Tickets represent a parallel experience to IRL immersive theater while helping to support our cast and reflect the value of a sustained performance led by a professional immersive actor. Tickets for Immersive theater shows for small audiences have high value in the real world, sometimes hundreds of dollars. If you would prefer to not experience Tempest, we have a multi-hour singleplayer experience called "Timeboat" also available. This is a single purchase and also gives permanent access to the multiplayer hub world.

reviews.review_description: I got lucky enough on my first entry into the Under to have a small group of people show me how to use the magic with the masks and such. I got even luckier to just happen to stumble upon one of the live performances, which came as a huge shock at first, but was honestly great. Being able to interact with the performer and join along in the show was a blast, and i’d like to think i helped to further the story a little. The only thing i have yet to learn is how to change the masks if possible! Have hardly played the main part of the game yet, mainly because i have been so entertained with The Under that i just dont want to leave to play the single player! But i have high hopes!

I feel deceived by this game.  VVR is one of my favorite games and I bought this knowing as little as possible which was recommended.  There is no game here, it's some kind of experience.  It missed the mark with me and unfortunately it took so long to figure out it was a gimmick I can no longer refund it.  I have not refunded a game yet and this one just left me feeling disappointed.  Tender claws should be more upfront about what this is.  Theres no spoiler by letting people know this isn't a game. It feels like your tricking people into trying to appreciate bad theatre.

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry you're not enjoying the Under.  We'd definitely consider it to be a game (It has time puzzles, mazes, exploration, mysteries to uncover, characters to save, multiplayer spells etc.) But our focus with the project was to make something unique that wasn't quite like other experiences, something that blended theater and more traditional exploratory Journey like gameplay. If you're still poking around I'd recommend trying to save all the characters on the ship, each one disappears in the later acts, but can be rescued in what we call their memory labyrinths.

reviews.review_description: This is the most mind boggling game I’ve ever played. It’s very confusing but in a way that makes the game incredibly fun and extremely immersive. Highly recommend.
I love this game so much life met so many people on this and can spend hours apon hours in this game and have only scratched the service

reviews.review_title: Not worth playing. Spend your $ elsewher
reviews.review_description: If you're on the fence don't buy. Another confusing puzzle vr game. Too similar to their other game virtual virtual reality.

Playing the free mins was fun. It opens up the curiosity.  I was excited and I want to rate it as 5 stars for its uniqueness. Then I decided to buy the Timeboat.  I realized the goal of the game is not clear. I was under the assumption that it’s like a detective game where you get clues which leads to something.  I was clueless so I end up researching in Youtube on some gameplay. But I still want to experience it for myself.  I tried to play for some mins but I decided this is not my style. I requested a refund but was denied because according to the statistics I’ve been playing for more than the grace period for refunds. That’s when I realized the free mins seem to count towards that. So that’s a mislabel. So that made me a little bit disappointed so I’m rating it as 4 now.  But don’t get me wrong. I still want to like this game. So I said Ok I might as well enjoy it since I can’t get any refunds anyway. 
And so I just continued on and over time I think I’m getting the hang of it. I’m actually surprised that the big-eyed cockroach-like character seemed to lecture me in one of the scenes. As if telling me to give it a chance. 

Why I’m giving it only a 3? It’s because for some gamers, it’s still important to have that feeling of satisfaction. Some of the Timeboat saves like in the case of Sandy is practically hard. I think I got nauseated in the re-tries. The time limit for carrying out the puzzle has to be increased or at least make a way out after some tries. Since this is more like an adventure game some help won’t spoil the game.  I’ve heard you get some reward if you’re able to save everyone. But that’s what leaves me unsatisfied. Sometimes it’s important for some of us to get completion or closure. Just out of curiosity. 
I’m not sure if I’ll try again or just leave it at that and move on to playing a different game. Maybe when I get bored. But for now, i’m clicking the pause button.

developer_response.body: Hey Sergs-vr! Thank you for your honest review. We're sorry the free demo resulted in the denial of your refund request, which was not a problem we had anticipated.

reviews.review_description: Look the trailer may have been a little misleading, as to where the two musicals are. The Wet food, and the one with the flashy lights, but my main concern is when there will be more plays to interact with. There’s no way Time Boat was the only one, there has to be more! This game has the absolute potential to be a triple A, but it needs more content. The scenery, story line, and the spatial interaction is amazing. Great game 4/5 stars!

I'm really in love with the idea and the art style of the game. The story is great as well! My only frustration is the multiplayer part. You can't jump into a game with someone specific, you just have to exit and reenter in hopes that you and whoever you're with gets placed in the same lobby, and even if you do it's not guaranteed you won't randomly get switched to another lobby.
Voices are a little loud for the background but I would love to get the full version soon.
